commit.subject: EX-7032 snapshot: debug replay-single.sh test_70f
commit.message:
EX-7032 snapshot: debug replay-single.sh test_70f

Verify if this failure is related to "FAILURE_MODE=HARD".

Test-Parameters: fortestonly trivial testlist=replay-single env=ONLY="70f",FAILURE_MODE=HARD,ONLY_REPEAT=30
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I3f1b8c12f3c4d99bbf44bbd90a81420466d3817f
